title: inga expansa
intro: Inga expansa, also known as the Inga tree or Guanacaste, is a tropical plant species native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Inga expansa include antioxidant and anti-arthritic effects, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Inga expansa is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, teas, and tinctures, often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
